host.title: MQTT Host
host.description: MQTT server host (IP address or hostname with mqtt:// or mqtts:// or ws:// or wss:// prefix) or mqtt+unix://<SOCKET_PATH> for Unix socket on Linux (e.g. mqtt+unix:///var/run/mosquitto/mqtt.sock). For secure connections, use the mqtts:// or wss:// prefix and ensure your certificates are configured. If you use a hostname, make sure that the hostname is resolvable by the system running matterbridge.

port.title: MQTT Port
port.description: MQTT server port (i.e. 1883 for mqtt://, 8883 for mqtts://, 9001 for ws:// or 9443 for wss://). For Unix socket, this value is ignored.

protocolVersion.title: MQTT Protocol Version
protocolVersion.description: MQTT server protocol version 3, 4 or 5 (default 5). Version 5 is recommended for most modern MQTT brokers.

username.title: MQTT Username
username.description: MQTT server authentication user. Only required if the MQTT server requires authentication (i.e allow_anonymous false)

password.title: MQTT Password
password.description: MQTT server authentication password. Only required if the MQTT server requires authentication (i.e allow_anonymous false)

clientId.title: MQTT Client ID
clientId.description: MQTT clientId identifier. If not set, a random clientId will be generated.

ca.title: MQTT CA Certificate
ca.description: Absolute path to the SSL/TLS CA certificate used to sign both the server and client certificates (PEM format). Required for secure connections (i.e. mqtts://) with self-signed certificates.

rejectUnauthorized.title: MQTT Reject Unauthorized
rejectUnauthorized.description: Reject unauthorized MQTT server. Only used for secure connections (i.e. mqtts://).

cert.title: MQTT Client Certificate
cert.description: Absolute path to the SSL/TLS MQTT client certificate (PEM format). Only required if the MQTT server requires a client certificate for authentication (i.e. require_certificate true).

key.title: MQTT Client Private Key
key.description: Absolute path to the SSL/TLS MQTT client private key (PEM format). Only required if the MQTT server requires a client certificate for authentication (i.e. require_certificate true).

topic.title: MQTT Topic
topic.description: MQTT base topic for Zigbee2MQTT MQTT messages. This should match the base_topic in your Zigbee2MQTT configuration.yaml file.

zigbeeFrontend.title: Zigbee Frontend
zigbeeFrontend.description: Zigbee frontend host to prefix the configUrl from matterbridge frontend (i.e. http://192.168.1.100:8080)

whiteList.title: White List
whiteList.description: Only the devices in the list will be exposed. If the list is empty, all the devices will be exposed.

blackList.title: Black List
blackList.description: The devices in the list will not be exposed. If the list is empty, no devices will be excluded.

switchList.title: Switch List
switchList.description: The devices in the list will be exposed like switches (don't use it for Alexa, use lightList or outletList instead).

lightList.title: Light List
lightList.description: The devices in the list will be exposed like lights.

outletList.title: Outlet List
outletList.description: The devices in the list will be exposed like outlets.

featureBlackList.title: Feature Black List
featureBlackList.description: The features in the list will not be exposed for all devices.

deviceFeatureBlackList.title: Device Feature Black List
deviceFeatureBlackList.description: List of features not to be exposed for a single device. Enter in the first field the name of the device and in the list add all the features to exclude.

additionalProperties.description: List of features not to be exposed for this device. Enter the feature (i.e. device_temperature) to exclude.

scenesType.title: Scenes Device Type
scenesType.description: Device type to use to expose scenes. If you use Alexa, don't use switch.

scenesPrefix.title: Scenes Prefix
scenesPrefix.description: Add the device/group friendly name before the scene name.

postfix.title: Device Postfix
postfix.description: Add this unique postfix (3 characters max) to each device serial to avoid collision with other instances (you may loose the configuration of the devices in your controller when changing this value).

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable the debug for the plugin (development only)

homeLocation.title: Home Location
homeLocation.description: Sets the home location in Latitude & Longitude coordinates to allow jewish calendar and weather to function properly and according to the home location.

dummySwitches.title: Dummy Switches
dummySwitches.description: Adds dummy virtual switches based on a configuration.

stateful.title: Stateful
stateful.description: The switch remains on instead of being automatically turned off.

time.title: Time
time.description: The switch will turn off after this number of milliseconds. Not used if the switch is stateful.

random.title: Random
random.description: Randomize the time (0ms to 'Time' setting) until a switch turns off. Not used if the switch is stateful.

resettable.title: Resettable
resettable.description: The timer will reset each time the switch is turned on.

reverse.title: Reverse
reverse.description: The switch's default state is on (logic is on -> off, off -> on).

debug.title: Debug
debug.description: Enable debug for this dummy switch.

candlelighting.title: Candle Lighting Time
candlelighting.description: Minutes before sunset to trigger candlelighting sensor

havdalah.title: Havdalah Time
havdalah.description: Minutes after sunset to trigger havdalah sensor

useSunsetStart.title: Use Sunset Start Time
useSunsetStart.description: Sets sunset time to when sunset starts

shminiAtzeretInSukkot.title: Shmini Atzeret In Sukkot
shminiAtzeretInSukkot.description: Sets if shmini atzeret is in sukkot

sefiratHaOmerCustom.title: Sefirat HaOmer Custom
sefiratHaOmerCustom.description: Custom month for sefirat haOmer counting

oneOf.title: Sephardic (Pessach to a day after Lag Ba'Omer)
Iyar2 (After Rosh Chodesh Iyar to 5 Sivan)

threeWeeksCustom.title: Three Weeks Custom
threeWeeksCustom.description: Custom for three weeks period (Calculates Nidcheh)

israel.title: In Israel
israel.description: Sets if the system is in israel

showEves.title: Show Eves
showEves.description: Sets whether to show events eves (Shabbat Eve, Pesach Eve etc.) by creating additional sensors.

offset.title: Offset
offset.description: Offset (in minutes) of the current time (Can be used to check and debug the system)

addShabbatModeDummySwitchType.title: Shabbat Mode Switch
addShabbatModeDummySwitchType.description: Device type to use to expose shabbat mode if defined

aqaraS1ActionsConfigData.title: Aqara S1 Scene Panels Configuration
aqaraS1ActionsConfigData.description: Configures an Aqara S1 Scene Panels controls

additionalProperties.description: Configures an Aqara S1 Scene Panel controls.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enables the AC controls page visibility.

name.title: Name
name.description: Sets the AC name on the panel's display.

modes.title: Modes
modes.description: Sets the AC modes available (Set based on supported modes of the controlled AC).

fanModes.title: Fan Modes
fanModes.description: Sets the AC fan speed modes available (Set based on supported fan speed modes of the controlled AC).

temperatureRanges.title: Temperature Ranges
temperatureRanges.description: Sets the AC temperature ranges available (Set based on supported temperature ranges of the controlled AC).

heat.title: Heat Mode Temperature Range
heat.description: Set the heat mode available temperature range.

lowest.title: Lowest Heat Mode Temperature
lowest.description: Sets the lowest temperature allowed in heat mode

highest.title: Highest Heat Mode Temperature
highest.description: Sets the highest temperature allowed in heat mode

cool.title: Cool Mode Temperature Range
cool.description: Set the cool mode available temperature range.

lowest.title: Lowest Cool Mode Temperature
lowest.description: Sets the lowest temperature allowed in cool mode

highest.title: Highest Cool Mode Temperature
highest.description: Sets the highest temperature allowed in cool mode

auto.title: Auto Mode Temperature Range
auto.description: Set the auto mode available temperature range.

lowest.title: Lowest Auto Mode Temperature
lowest.description: Sets the lowest temperature allowed in auto mode

highest.title: Highest Auto Mode Temperature
highest.description: Sets the highest temperature allowed in auto mode

dry.title: Dry Mode Temperature Range
dry.description: Set the dry mode available temperature range.

lowest.title: Lowest Dry Mode Temperature
lowest.description: Sets the lowest temperature allowed in dry mode

highest.title: Highest Dry Mode Temperature
highest.description: Sets the highest temperature allowed in dry mode

fan.title: Fan Mode Temperature Range
fan.description: Set the fan mode available temperature range.

lowest.title: Lowest Fan Mode Temperature
lowest.description: Sets the lowest temperature allowed in fan mode

highest.title: Highest Fan Mode Temperature
highest.description: Sets the highest temperature allowed in fan mode

internalThermostat.title: Internal Thermostat
internalThermostat.description: Sets whether the AC have internal temperature sensor to be shown on the AC control page. If not, then if there's a temperature sensor configured, it will be shown instead.

endpoints.title: Endpoints
endpoints.description: Sets the AC endpoints to control.

enabled.description: Enables the light no. 1 controls page visibility.

name.title: Name
name.description: Sets the light name on the panel's display

lightType.description: Sets the light control type (Set based on the controlled light capabilities).

endpoints.description: Sets the light endpoints to control.

coverType.description: Sets the cover control type (Set based on the controlled cover device type).

switchesLinks.title: Lights & Switches Links
switchesLinks.description: Configures links between switches (alternates, lights etc)

switches.title: Source Switches
switches.description: Sets the source switches which used to control the linked lights.

linkedDevices.title: Linked Devices
linkedDevices.description: Sets the destination linked devices (Lights, Outlets, Switches etc.).

resetLight.title: Reset Light
resetLight.description: Sets whether and when to reset lights with brightness and/or color when being turned on from a source switch.

resetColorTemperature.title: Reset Color Temperature
resetColorTemperature.description: If 'Reset Light' is set to 'Color Temperature', set which color temperature to use as reset.

resetAlways.title: Reset Always
resetAlways.description: If 'Reset Light' is set, this setting will make it reset even if the light is turned on after long time (2 seconds) since the last turn off action.

switchesOnStateCommands.title: Switches On Commands
switchesOnStateCommands.description: Configures actions when enabling switches logic.

additionalProperties.description: Attribute Name
Attribute Setting

switchesOffStateCommands.title: Switches Off Commands
switchesOffStateCommands.description: Configures actions when enabling switches logic.

additionalProperties.description: Attribute Name
Attribute Setting

switchesActions.title: Switches Actions
switchesActions.description: Configures actions for remote switches (Like Hue Dimmer Switch, IKEA TRADFRI, Aqara H1 atc.).

additionalProperties.title: Source Trigger
additionalProperties.description: Source switch device (/switch_button_action_name to control specific input action. Ignores 'Switch Type' and expects 'Repeat Action' setting)

switchType.title: Switch Type
switchType.description: In case the whole switch is in the 'Source Trigger' field, controls the type of switch so behaviour is as expected (If listed).

repeat.title: Repeat Action
repeat.description: If 'Switch Type' is not in effect it controls whether to repeat the action until another button is triggered.

linkedDevices.title: Linked Devices
linkedDevices.description:
Destination linked devices (with /Endpoint [Name] if applicable [in Multi endpoints entities], for example: <Device IEEE/Endpoint>).
If its a 'Switch Type'-based or Action-To-Do, specify only the endpoint name without the parameter (without state/brightness/color_temp/etc, like 'center' or 'l3')

additionalProperties.title: Value
additionalProperties.description: Empty for 'Switch Type'-based, otherwise Action-To-Do or value

publishRepeat.title: Publish Repeat
publishRepeat.description: Allows repeating the basic state publish after state of a device have changed to ensure correct state in case of publish command execution fail or errors.

repeatCount.title: Publish Repeat Count
repeatCount.description: The amount of times a basic state of a Light, Switch and Outlet will be published (to ensure up-to-date state).

blackList.title: Publish Repeat Black List
blackList.description: List of devices to black list some or all of its features from the repeat publish logic.

additionalProperties.title: Features Black List
additionalProperties.description: List of features not to be published for this device. Enter the feature (i.e. state, state_l1, state_center, brightness) to exclude (Leave empty for all features).

separateDeviceEndpoints.title: Separated Endpoints
separateDeviceEndpoints.description: Devices with multiple endpoints which will create separate Matter devices.

additionalProperties.title: Endpoints
additionalProperties.description: List of endpoints to be exposed as separate device. Enter the endpoint name (i.e. l3, l5 etc.).

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown (development only)
